title: astragalus ebenoides
intro: Astragalus ebenoides, also known as Eben's milkvetch or Eben's astragalus, is a perennial legume native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that help protect against cellular damage and promote overall health. The health benefits of Astragalus ebenoides include boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and supporting cardiovascular health. Astragalus ebenoides is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and can be used in traditional herbal medicine to promote well-being and resilience.
